prompt: Kuukikan (空気感) style hyper-realistic film photograph. London suburban home front door, next morning. Two delivery boxes sit on the doorstep — one branded The North Face and one branded Adidas (both visible but not overly prominent). Morning diffused light illuminates the white-painted front door and the boxes. A traditional London Victorian/Edwardian house entrance with a tiled path. A small potted plant beside the door. No people present. The door is closed. Color grading: clean neutral morning tones. The white door and delivery boxes create a crisp, resolved feeling. Film-like desaturation. The warm morning light gives a gentle golden cast. The cardboard texture of the boxes is tactile and real. Composition: 16:9 wide frame. The white door and surrounding brick wall provide generous negative space (upper two-thirds). The two boxes are positioned in the lower third, small but clearly visible. Asymmetrical — boxes slightly to one side. Camera: 35mm lens, f/4.0, ISO 200. Fine film grain (ISO 200, subtle). Morning dew on the doorstep tiles catches light. Old-lens peripheral softness. The mood is quiet resolution — 'it's done.' Last time it was returns and re-orders. This time, two boxes, both right, delivered. A still, satisfying morning.
negative_prompt: dramatic lighting, lens flare, HDR, oversaturated, CGI, studio lighting, people, open door, night, rain, text overlays, watermarks, logos, AI smoothing, digital painting, anime, cartoon, illustration, American house style
